StepItem.Name: Section 1: Power Up and System Setup
Section 2: System Voltages, Write Calibrations, Check Temperature and Torque Position Signals
Section 4: Verify SW and Cal Version Procedure
Section 6: End of Line Writes, Verify Data
Configure Current and Voltage Limit on DUT Power Supply
1.14 Perform function tester initialization and checks
SET CURRENT LIMIT ON PS TO PROTECT DMM
2.22.0 Measure funtion test stand voltage DC Supply +
2.32.0 Set DC Supply to Level 4 - limits
2.44.01 Verify HW Torque trim performed T1
2.44.02 Verify HW Torque trim performed T2
2.64 Write Controller Serial Number Scanned in Section 1
2.66 Write HW Part Number to controller
2.68 Write EPS Serial Number with null
3.12 Disconnect Motor Stator Phase Leads A, B, C
3.20 Connect Motor Stator Phase Leads A, B, C
DUT Calibration Power Supply Limits Set
3.38.2 Disconnect Calibration Power Suplly from phases
3.40 Connect Phase leads from controller to motor
3.46 Periodic message - Comm Enable Wake up
3.52 Apply 1.5V to Phase A through 1kohm resistor
3.56 Remove voltage applied to Phase A
3.58 Set Motor Signal speed to level 2 (1200RPM)
3.62 Set Motor Signal speed to zero
3.63 Periodic message - Comm Enable Wake up
3.88 Check difference between first and second motor positions
5.5.22 Set motor Sense magnet speed to Level 2
5.26 Set motor Sense magnet speed to Zero
5.42 Set Motor Sense Magnet Speed to Level 1
5.56 Set motor Sense magnet speed to Zero
5.56 Set motor Sense magnet speed to Zero
Save SN and HW patr number
6.28 Periodic message - Comm Enable Wake up
6.62 Periodic message - Comm Enable Wake up
6.68 Switch Rq into Series with DC Supply +
6.70 Measure Voltage across Rq for Ignition Off current measurement
6.72 Switch Rq out of Series with DC Supply +
6.88 Measure voltage across DC Supply + and - terminals
5.26 Set motor Sense magnet speed to Zero
5.26 Set motor Sense magnet speed to Zero
5.60 Set motor Sense magnet speed to Zero
Set Value and State to CH2
Wait For DC Curernt to be in limits
Switch DMM I to BAT- ON
Switch DMM I to BAT- OFF

SequenceItem.Name: Connect Calibration Power Supply R1k Phase A
Disconnect Calibration Power Supply R1k Phase A
